# FourSight Lab

> FourSight Lab is an AI and data intelligence consultancy that builds agentic AI systems for businesses — proven in production. Our work spans agentic RAG and knowledge systems, document and process automation, predictive and decision intelligence, live monitoring, and agent interoperability (including open-source MCP servers and OGC/INSPIRE geospatial integration).

We help organizations turn raw data into decisive action through tailored AI systems that read, decide, and act. Our approach is problem-first: we start with your business challenge, then choose the right technology — whether that's an agentic RAG pipeline, a predictive model, or a standards-based connector.

## Practice areas (orbits)

- **Agentic Knowledge & RAG**: Retrieval that reasons over multiple sources to answer in plain language with citations — built for massive concurrent usage and kept current by live crawlers feeding the knowledge base.
- **Document & Process Automation**: Agents that read, complete, and correct documents — including handwritten content from scanned PDFs (HTR) — auto-complete official paperwork via public APIs, and push clean, structured data into ERP (e.g. SoftOne) and other systems.
- **Predictive & Decision Intelligence**: Churn and acquisition models that forecast outcomes and recommend the next best action; extends to demand forecasting, lifetime-value, lead scoring, and risk/fraud detection.
- **Live Monitoring & Analytics**: Real-time dashboards (e.g. live energy monitoring) that turn streaming energy, operations, and sensor data into action as it arrives, with anomaly and threshold alerting.
- **Agent Interoperability & Geospatial AI**: Open-source MCP servers and standards-based connectors that let AI agents query OGC map services (WMS/WFS) and INSPIRE-compliant GIS data.

## Pages

- [Home](https://foursightlab.com/): Company overview and solution catalog.
- [Agentic Knowledge & RAG](https://foursightlab.com/rag-systems/): Agentic RAG and knowledge systems.
- [Document & Process Automation](https://foursightlab.com/document-extraction/): Document reading, completion, correction, and system integration.
- [Predictive & Decision Intelligence](https://foursightlab.com/predictive-analytics/): Forecasting and next-best-action models.
- [Live Monitoring & Analytics](https://foursightlab.com/real-time-analytics/): Real-time dashboards and streaming analytics.
- [Agent Interoperability & Geospatial AI](https://foursightlab.com/agent-interoperability/): MCP servers and geospatial agent integration.
- [FAQ](https://foursightlab.com/faq/): Plain-language answers — what we do, agentic AI vs chatbots, agentic RAG, custom systems, data/industries, and how to get started.
